nodes.label: evocore v5 Design Spec
nodes.summary: Design fixing v4 follow-ups: _run_child_engine importability, ProcessPoolExecutor teardown, CMAESEngine process parallel guard, and run_multiple wall-clock accounting.

nodes.label: Process parallel teardown
nodes.summary: ProcessParallel and run_multiple use try/finally and shutdown(cancel_futures=True, wait=False) to avoid worker hangs after exceptions.

edges.rationale: The v5 spec states that it supersedes the v4 design.
v5 specifies try/finally teardown for ProcessParallel and run_multiple.
